title: Harmony's Song
description: A weapons mod that adds new swords and a scythe and Battleaxe set
body:
Harmony's song gives new materials and weapons that feel vanilla but have a new high fantasy-like feel to it

Harmony's song V1 adds:
--weapon sets
-Wooden, stone, golden, iron, diamond, and netherite battleaxes.
-Wooden, stone, golden, iron, diamond, and netherite Scythes.
--materials 
-Magma Tesseract Core
-Star Shards
-Malumium Ore
-Malumium ingot
-Raw Malumium
-Frost Steel
--Swords
-Angelicur
-Magma Ignis
-Gladius Inferni Vindictae
-Helcalibur

All sword artwork was done by Harmony Lwin Sandfeld
